Example

Class StructureSet

Namespace
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API
Assembly
VMS.TPS.Common.Model.API.dll

A structure set is a container for structures of a patient, including anatomical organs, treatment volumes and markers, and support structures.

public class StructureSet : ApiDataObject, IXmlSerializable
Inheritance
object
SerializableObject

StructureSet

The series that contains this plan. Null if the plan is not connected to a series.

Series

SeriesUID

The DICOM UID of the series that contains this structure set. Empty string if the structure set is not connected to a series.

Property Value

string

Methods

AddCouchStructures(string, PatientOrientation, RailPosition, RailPosition, double?, double?, double?, out IReadOnlyList<Structure>, out bool, out string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Adds couch structures to the StructureSet. Eclipse can model certain couches for photon treatment planning. A couch is modeled as a set of couch structures.The couch panel surface and interior, movable structural rails and grid(for Unipanel only) are each modeled as separate couch structures. The structure code of a couch structure is Support by default. You can change it to another structure code if necessary. The volume type of a couch structure is always Support. Couch structures are modeled inside a 3D image. If the 3D image is too small, this method will always enlarge the image to fit the couch structures.

public bool AddCouchStructures(string couchModel, PatientOrientation orientation, RailPosition railA, RailPosition railB, double? surfaceHU, double? interiorHU, double? railHU, out IReadOnlyList<Structure> addedStructures, out bool imageResized, out string error)

Parameters

couchModel string

The id of the couch profile configured in Eclipse to use when creating the couch structures.

orientation PatientOrientation

Patient orientation specifying where the couch structures are added. Pass NoOrientation to take the orientation from the image.

railA RailPosition

Position of moveable rail A.

railB RailPosition

Position of moveable rail B.

surfaceHU double?

HU value of the modeled couch surface. Pass null to use the setting from the specified couch profile or override by passing another value.

interiorHU double?

HU value of the modeled couch interior. Pass null to use the setting from the specified couch profile or override by passing another value.

railHU double?

HU value of the modeled couch rails. Pass null to use the setting from the specified couch profile or override by passing another value.

addedStructures IReadOnlyList<Structure>

Returned list of added couch structures if successful.

imageResized bool

True if image was resized.

error string

Returned error message if call failed.

Returns

bool

True if couch structures added.

AddReferenceLine(string, string, VVector[])

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Adds a new reference line.

public Structure AddReferenceLine(string name, string id, VVector[] referenceLinePoints)

Parameters

name string

Reference line name.

id string

Reference line Id.

referenceLinePoints VVector[]

Reference line points. Number of points: 1 .. 500.

Returns

Structure

Newly created reference line.

AddStructure(string, string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Adds a new structure according to the DICOM structure type.

public Structure AddStructure(string dicomType, string id)

Parameters

dicomType string

RT ROI Interpreted Type (DICOM). Identifies the DICOM structure type. Possible values are "AVOIDANCE", "CAVITY", "CONTRAST_AGENT", "CTV", "EXTERNAL", "GTV", "IRRAD_VOLUME", "ORGAN", "PTV", "TREATED_VOLUME", "SUPPORT", "FIXATION", "CONTROL", and "DOSE_REGION".

id string

The identifier for the new structure.

Returns

Structure

Newly created structure.

AddStructure(StructureCodeInfo)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Adds a new structure based on structure code. The DICOM structure type and structure ID are automatically assigned.

public Structure AddStructure(StructureCodeInfo code)

Parameters

code StructureCodeInfo

The structure code.

Returns

Structure

Newly created structure.

CanAddCouchStructures(out string)

This method is used to verify whether it is possible to add couch structures to the StructureSet.

public bool CanAddCouchStructures(out string error)

Parameters

error string

Returned reason why couch structures cannot be added if method returns false.

Returns

bool

True if couch structures can be added.

CanAddStructure(string, string)

Returns true if it is possible to add the given type of structure to the structure set.

public bool CanAddStructure(string dicomType, string id)

Parameters

dicomType string

RT ROI Interpreted Type (DICOM). Identifies the DICOM structure type. Possible values are "AVOIDANCE", "CAVITY", "CONTRAST_AGENT", "CTV", "EXTERNAL", "GTV", "IRRAD_VOLUME", "ORGAN", "PTV", "TREATED_VOLUME", "SUPPORT", "FIXATION", "CONTROL", and "DOSE_REGION".

id string

The identifier for the new structure.

Returns

bool

true if it is possible to add the given type of structure to the structure set. Otherwise false.

CanRemoveCouchStructures(out string)

This method is used to verify whether it is possible to remove couch structures from the StructureSet.

public bool CanRemoveCouchStructures(out string error)

Parameters

error string

Returned reason why couch structures cannot be removed if method returns false.

Returns

bool

True if couch structures can be removed.

CanRemoveStructure(Structure)

Returns true if it is possible to remove the given structure from the structure set.

public bool CanRemoveStructure(Structure structure)

Parameters

structure Structure

The structure to check.

Returns

bool

Returns true if the structure can be removed, false otherwise.

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Creates a copy of this structure set.

public StructureSet Copy()

Returns

StructureSet

The newly created copy of the structure set.

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Creates a new Body structure and searches Body with the specified parameters. The existing Body structure is returned, if there is one.

parameters SearchBodyParameters

Parameters for the Search Body feature.

Returns

Structure

Newly created or already existing Body structure.

public SearchBodyParameters GetDefaultSearchBodyParameters()

SearchBodyParameters

Parameters for the Search Body feature.

RemoveCouchStructures(out IReadOnlyList<string>, out string)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Removes couch structures from the StructureSet.

public bool RemoveCouchStructures(out IReadOnlyList<string> removedStructureIds, out string error)

Parameters

removedStructureIds IReadOnlyList<string>

Returned list of removed couch structure IDs if successful.

error string

Returned error message if call failed.

Returns

bool

True if couch structures were removed.

RemoveStructure(Structure)

[Availability of this method depends on your Eclipse Scripting API license] Removes the structure from this structure set if removal is allowed.

public void RemoveStructure(Structure structure)

Parameters

structure Structure

The structure to remove.
